final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining AI-related concepts and their relationships.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include each concept as a labeled node with definition text, connected by relationship lines/arrows showing how concepts relate to each other
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with definitions and relationship links:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: needs a light, approachable background — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable educational atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a clear, readable direction with visual hierarchy — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketch texture feel — exact line weight and paper texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all 7 concept labels verbatim: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concepts; each concept must have a short definition snippet and at least one visible relationship arrow or connector to related concepts; layout must be readable and not overcrowded
Avoid: overly technical dense text blocks; sterile corporate chart style
